framework.name: Execution-Count Release Consistency (RCC) for credentials
framework.description: Operation-bounded credentials that force revalidation after N operations rather than after T seconds. Grounded in release consistency theory — equivalent to acquire/release synchronization at coherence boundaries. Achieves 184× reduction vs lease TTL in anomaly scenarios (16.0±3.7 vs 2,950.8±3.6 unauthorized ops).
framework.raw_quote: RCC at n=50 yields 50.0±0 (σ=0, confirming theorem 3.1 exactly)

source.title: [PDF] Structural Equivalence Between Memory Consistency Models ... - arXiv
